answers: Preservation methods: refrigeration, freezing, canning, drying, salting, pickling, vacuum sealing, and fermentation.
Freezing tips: blanch vegetables first, use freezer bags with air removed, label with date. Most food stays good 3-12 months.
Canning basics: use proper jars, follow tested recipes, process in boiling water bath or pressure canner depending on food acidity.
Khabar shongrokkhon: shukhiye rakhun (dal, moshla), achar baniye rakhun, freeze korun, ar vacuum seal korun.
